titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 187: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 187. (A.R. No. 265 of 1902.) KĪḺŪR, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

Records a gift of 1/4 śey of land after purchase from the sabhaiyār of Tirukkōvalūr after remitting both the price-money and tax-money to the sabhā and got tax-free by Tiruviśaiyaṉ Kumaraṉ alias Vānavan Pālūr-nāṭṭu Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Talaiyāṭṭi of Pālūr in Pālūr-kūṟṟam, for burning a perpetual lamp with an uḻakku of oil daily to the Tiruvīraṭṭanatt-āḻvār at Tirukkōvalūr in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam (a sub-division) of Malāḍu. He also donated one Īḻa-lamp for burning the same.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. VII No. 893.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu tiruk
kovalūrt tiruviraṭṭānattāḷvārkkup pālūrkkūṟṟattu pālūr Uṭaiya talaiyāṭṭi tiruvicaiya
ṉ kumaraṉākiya vānavan pālūr nāṭṭu muventaveḷān cantrātittaval vaitta nontā viḷakkonṟi
nukku nicatam Uḻakkuney koṇṭerikka tirukkovalūr sabhaiyā(r)riṭai koṇṭa nilam kaḷiyakkaḻanik kāṇik
kolpāṭṭil mekkaṭaiya kār ceyūm vilaidravya(ya)mum Iṟaidravyamum kuṭuttukkoṇṭu vaitteṉ Iviḷakkeriya I
ṭṭa Īḻaviḷakku Oṉṟu Itupaṉmāheśvarara(k)kṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
